stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
Which statement is correct for a city with coordinates 48°25′N 122°32′E﻿ on 12th of October?

options.a: The start of evening civil twilight is at 17:48 UTC.
options.b: The start of evening civil twilight is at 17:48 LMT.
options.c: The end of evening civil twilight is at 17:48 UTC.
options.d: The end of evening civil twilight is at 17:48 LMT.
